evidence_for: AUTHORITY.md band_table, identifiers_available, who_files (Status: Member), cadence_and_lag claims

source.note_on_provenance: Fetched fresh by the sampler role (MANIFEST.json case 'multi_row_sp_vehicle'); re-derived independently here (pdftotext -layout) for the survey, sha256 cross-checked against the manifest pin.

verification.observed: Filing ID #20019182 (Hon. Lloyd K. Smucker, PA11), 8 sale rows. Amount bands OBSERVED verbatim in the text layer: '$1,001 - $15,000' (x3), '$15,001 - $50,000', '$50,001 - $100,000', '$100,001 - $250,000' (x2). Every row's Owner column is blank; the Investment Vehicle Details section lists one vehicle 'Sale of Spouse Inherited Assets (Owner: SP)' matched to every row by exact 'S O :' string — confirming vehicle-level owner inheritance (owner_code SP -> Gold owner=spouse) even when the row-level owner cell is blank. Identifiers: filer identified only by 'Name:' (Hon. Lloyd K. Smucker) + 'State/District: PA11'; no bioguide/member id anywhere. Instruments identified only by company name + ticker in parens + trailing [XX] asset-type code (e.g. 'Fulton Financial Corporation - Common Stock (FULT) [ST]'); no ISIN/CUSIP/FIGI anywhere. Status: Member. Transaction/notification dates observed 04/17-04/23/2026, signed 04/30/2026 — consistent with the STOCK Act's 30-day-from-notification ceiling.

politeness.incidents: none — re-read of an already-fetched, sha-verified fixture
